---
title: Determining Transcription Factors in top Differentially Expressed Markers
date: 2024-07-19
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
execute:
  eval: false
---

# Goal of this analysis

1. Determine the transcription factors in the differentially expressed markers
2. Create a volcano plot with transcription factors highlighted

# Files and directories

## Input

List of markers can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240715/sig_ubc_markers.csv`

## Output

The output can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240719`

# Process and Results

Using the `scrnaseq_env` conda environment

Lets load in the required libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(jsonlite)
library(ggrepel)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}
set.seed(1)
out_directory <- "/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240719"
if (!dir.exists(out_directory)) {
  dir.create(out_directory, recursive = TRUE)
}
```

Loading the markers as well as the list of TFs
```{r}
ubc_markers <- read.csv("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240715/all_tested_genes.csv")

# From Lambert et al. 2018 (Cell)
lambert_tf <- read.csv("/.mounts/labs/pailab/src/transcription-factors/human-tfs-lambert/full_database_v1.01.csv") %>%
    filter(Is.TF. == "Yes") %>%
    select(tf = HGNC.symbol) %>%
    unique()

# From HOCOMOCO v12
hocomoco_tf <- readLines("/.mounts/labs/pailab/src/transcription-factors/HOCOMOCOv12/H12CORE_annotation.jsonl") %>% 
  lapply(fromJSON) %>%
  sapply(function(x) x$tf) %>%
  data.frame() %>%
  setNames("tf") %>%
  unique()
```

```{r}
# If only want most confident TFs, take intersect of the two lists
intersecting_tf <- intersect(lambert_tf, hocomoco_tf)  

# If want all potential TFs, take union of the two lists
union_tf <- union(lambert_tf, hocomoco_tf)
```

```{r}
> print(nrow(intersecting_tf))
[1] 537
> print(nrow(union_tf))
[1] 2051
> print(nrow(lambert_tf))
[1] 1639
> print(nrow(hocomoco_tf))
[1] 949
```

```{r}
tf_markers_hoco <- ubc_markers %>%
  filter(feature %in% hocomoco_tf$tf) %>%
  write.csv(file = file.path(out_directory, "hocomoco_tf_ubc.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

tf_markers_lamb <- ubc_markers %>%
  filter(feature %in% lambert_tf$tf) %>%
  write.csv(file = file.path(out_directory, "lambert_tf_ubc.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

tf_markers_union <- ubc_markers %>%
  filter(feature %in% union_tf$tf) %>%
  write.csv(file = file.path(out_directory, "union_tf_ubc.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

tf_markers_intersect <- ubc_markers %>%
  filter(feature %in% intersecting_tf$tf) %>%
  write.csv(file = file.path(out_directory, "intersect_tf_ubc.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
ubc_tf_markers <- ubc_markers %>%
  mutate(is_TF_hoco = feature %in% hocomoco_tf$tf) %>%
  mutate(is_TF_lamb = feature %in% lambert_tf$tf) %>%
  mutate(is_TF = feature %in% union_tf$tf)

ald_markers <- ubc_tf_markers %>%
  select(
    p_val = Aldinger_full_cerebellum_human_p_val, 
    avg_log2FC = Aldinger_full_cerebellum_human_avg_log2FC, 
    pct.1 = Aldinger_full_cerebellum_human_pct.1,
    pct.2 = Aldinger_full_cerebellum_human_pct.2,
    p_val_adj = Aldinger_full_cerebellum_human_p_val_adj,
    cluster,
    feature,
    is_TF_hoco,
    is_TF_lamb,
    is_TF) %>%
  split(.$cluster)

sepp_markers <- ubc_tf_markers %>%
  select(
    p_val = Sepp_full_cerebellum_human_p_val, 
    avg_log2FC = Sepp_full_cerebellum_human_avg_log2FC, 
    pct.1 = Sepp_full_cerebellum_human_pct.1,
    pct.2 = Sepp_full_cerebellum_human_pct.2,
    p_val_adj = Sepp_full_cerebellum_human_p_val_adj,
    cluster,
    feature,
    is_TF_hoco,
    is_TF_lamb,
    is_TF) %>%
  split(.$cluster)
```

## Volcano Plots

Aldinger genes
```{r}
source("/u/llau/software/mb_scrnaseq/MB_scRNAseq/software/utilities/plotting.R")

for(cluster in names(ald_markers)){
    variable_markers <- ald_markers[[cluster]]

    # Setting log2FC threshold
    log_fc_thresh <- 0.5
    
    # Adding column to determine if gene is up regulated or down regulated
    variable_markers <- mutate(
      variable_markers,
      direction = case_when(
        variable_markers$avg_log2FC >= log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Upregulated",
        variable_markers$avg_log2FC <= -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Downregulated",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
        )
      )
    variable_markers$direction <- factor(variable_markers$direction, levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated", "Not significant"))

    # Adding column denotating genes to label
    variable_markers$feature_labelled <- ifelse(abs(variable_markers$avg_log2FC) > log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05, variable_markers$feature, NA)

    # Dealing with padjval = 0. -log10(0) = infinity therefore we need to deal with the 0 value by setting it as something small
    non_zero <- variable_markers$p_val_adj[variable_markers$p_val_adj != 0]
    # Find the smallest value
    min_val <- min(non_zero)
    # Multiply the smallest value by 0.1 and assign to p_val_adj values
    variable_markers$p_val_adj <- ifelse(variable_markers$p_val_adj == 0, min_val*exp(-1), variable_markers$p_val_adj)
    
    n_up <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC > log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)
    n_down <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC < -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)
    
    gene_numbers <- paste0(
      "n = ", nrow(variable_markers),
      "; down = ", n_down,
      "; up = ", n_up
    )

    # Creating the volcano plot
    plt <- make_volcano(
      data = variable_markers,
      log_fc = avg_log2FC,
      log_pval = -log10(p_val_adj),
      direction = direction,
      #gene_labels = feature_labelled,
      log_fc_thresh = c(-log_fc_thresh, log_fc_thresh),
      log_pval_thresh = -log10(0.05),
      label_num_genes = TRUE
    ) + 
    theme_classic() +
    labs(x = expression(log[2]~"(fold change)"), y = expression(-log[10]~"(adj. p-value)")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Upregulated" = "red", "Downregulated" = "blue", "Not significant" = "grey")) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = is_TF), size = 3) + 
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 8, "FALSE" = 16)) + # Circle for FALSE, star for TRUE
    ggtitle(cluster) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(title = NULL), shape = guide_legend(title = "TF")) +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = feature_labelled), size = 2, show.legend = FALSE) +
    labs(subtitle = gene_numbers)

    volcano_name <- paste0("aldinger_", cluster, "_volcano_plot.png")
    ggsave(filename = volcano_name, plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
}
```

Sepp genes
```{r}
for(cluster in names(sepp_markers)){
    variable_markers <- sepp_markers[[cluster]]

    # Setting log2FC threshold
    log_fc_thresh <- 0.5
    
    # Adding column to determine if gene is up regulated or down regulated
    variable_markers <- mutate(
      variable_markers,
      direction = case_when(
        variable_markers$avg_log2FC >= log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Upregulated",
        variable_markers$avg_log2FC <= -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Downregulated",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
        )
      )
    variable_markers$direction <- factor(variable_markers$direction, levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated", "Not significant"))

    # Adding column denotating genes to label
    variable_markers$feature_labelled <- ifelse(abs(variable_markers$avg_log2FC) > log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05, variable_markers$feature, NA)

    # Dealing with padjval = 0. -log10(0) = infinity therefore we need to deal with the 0 value by setting it as something small
    non_zero <- variable_markers$p_val_adj[variable_markers$p_val_adj != 0]
    # Find the smallest value
    min_val <- min(non_zero)
    # Multiply the smallest value by 0.1 and assign to p_val_adj values
    variable_markers$p_val_adj <- ifelse(variable_markers$p_val_adj == 0, min_val*exp(-1), variable_markers$p_val_adj)
    
    n_up <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC > log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)
    n_down <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC < -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)
    
    gene_numbers <- paste0(
      "n = ", nrow(variable_markers),
      "; down = ", n_down,
      "; up = ", n_up
    )

    # Creating the volcano plot
    plt <- make_volcano(
      data = variable_markers,
      log_fc = avg_log2FC,
      log_pval = -log10(p_val_adj),
      direction = direction,
      #gene_labels = feature_labelled,
      log_fc_thresh = c(-log_fc_thresh, log_fc_thresh),
      log_pval_thresh = -log10(0.05),
      label_num_genes = TRUE
    ) + 
    theme_classic() +
    labs(x = expression(log[2]~"(fold change)"), y = expression(-log[10]~"(adj. p-value)")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Upregulated" = "red", "Downregulated" = "blue", "Not significant" = "grey")) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = is_TF), size = 3) + 
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 8, "FALSE" = 16)) + # Circle for FALSE, star for TRUE
    ggtitle(cluster) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(title = NULL), shape = guide_legend(title = "TF")) +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = feature_labelled), size = 2, show.legend = FALSE) +
    labs(subtitle = gene_numbers)

    volcano_name <- paste0("sepp_", cluster, "_volcano_plot.png")
    ggsave(filename = volcano_name, plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
}
```

## TFs

Aldinger TFs
```{r}
for(cluster in names(ald_markers)){
    variable_markers <- ald_markers[[cluster]] %>%
      filter(is_TF == "TRUE")

    # Setting log2FC threshold
    log_fc_thresh <- 0
    
    # Adding column denotating genes to label
    variable_markers$feature_labelled <- ifelse(variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05, variable_markers$feature, NA)

    # Adding column to determine if gene is up regulated or down regulated
    variable_markers <- mutate(
      variable_markers,
      direction = case_when(
        variable_markers$avg_log2FC >= log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Upregulated",
        variable_markers$avg_log2FC <= -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Downregulated",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
        )
      )
    variable_markers$direction <- factor(variable_markers$direction, levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated", "Not significant"))

    # Dealing with padjval = 0. -log10(0) = infinity therefore we need to deal with the 0 value by setting it as something small
    non_zero <- variable_markers$p_val_adj[variable_markers$p_val_adj != 0]
    # Find the smallest value
    min_val <- min(non_zero)
    # Multiply the smallest value by 0.1 and assign to p_val_adj values
    variable_markers$p_val_adj <- ifelse(variable_markers$p_val_adj == 0, min_val*exp(-1), variable_markers$p_val_adj)
    
    n_up <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC > log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)
    n_down <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC < -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)
    
    gene_numbers <- paste0(
      "n = ", nrow(variable_markers),
      "; down = ", n_down,
      "; up = ", n_up
    )

    # Creating the volcano plot
    plt <- make_volcano(
      data = variable_markers,
      log_fc = avg_log2FC,
      log_pval = -log10(p_val_adj),
      log_fc_thresh = c(-log_fc_thresh, log_fc_thresh),
      log_pval_thresh = -log10(0.05),
      label_num_genes = TRUE
    ) + 
    theme_classic() +
    labs(x = expression(log[2]~"(fold change)"), y = expression(-log[10]~"(adj. p-value)")) +
    geom_point(aes(color = direction)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Upregulated" = "red", "Downregulated" = "blue", "Not significant" = "grey")) +
    ggtitle(cluster) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = feature_labelled), size = 3, show.legend = FALSE) +
    labs(subtitle = gene_numbers)

    volcano_name <- paste0("aldinger_", cluster, "_tf_volcano_plot.png")
    ggsave(filename = volcano_name, plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
}
```

Sepp TFs
```{r}
for(cluster in names(sepp_markers)){
    variable_markers <- sepp_markers[[cluster]] %>%
      filter(is_TF == "TRUE")

    # Setting log2FC threshold
    log_fc_thresh <- 0
    
    # Adding column denotating genes to label
    variable_markers$feature_labelled <- ifelse(variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05, variable_markers$feature, NA)

    # Adding column to determine if gene is up regulated or down regulated
    variable_markers <- mutate(
      variable_markers,
      direction = case_when(
        variable_markers$avg_log2FC >= log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Upregulated",
        variable_markers$avg_log2FC <= -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Downregulated",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
        )
      )
    variable_markers$direction <- factor(variable_markers$direction, levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated", "Not significant"))

    # Dealing with padjval = 0. -log10(0) = infinity therefore we need to deal with the 0 value by setting it as something small
    non_zero <- variable_markers$p_val_adj[variable_markers$p_val_adj != 0]
    # Find the smallest value
    min_val <- min(non_zero)
    # Multiply the smallest value by 0.1 and assign to p_val_adj values
    variable_markers$p_val_adj <- ifelse(variable_markers$p_val_adj == 0, min_val*exp(-1), variable_markers$p_val_adj)
    
    n_up <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC > log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)
    n_down <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC < -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)
    
    gene_numbers <- paste0(
      "n = ", nrow(variable_markers),
      "; down = ", n_down,
      "; up = ", n_up
    )

    # Creating the volcano plot
    plt <- make_volcano(
      data = variable_markers,
      log_fc = avg_log2FC,
      log_pval = -log10(p_val_adj),
      log_fc_thresh = c(-log_fc_thresh, log_fc_thresh),
      log_pval_thresh = -log10(0.05),
      label_num_genes = TRUE
    ) + 
    theme_classic() +
    labs(x = expression(log[2]~"(fold change)"), y = expression(-log[10]~"(adj. p-value)")) +
    geom_point(aes(color = direction)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Upregulated" = "red", "Downregulated" = "blue", "Not significant" = "grey")) +
    ggtitle(cluster) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = feature_labelled), size = 3, show.legend = FALSE) +
    labs(subtitle = gene_numbers)

    volcano_name <- paste0("sepp_", cluster, "_tf_volcano_plot.png")
    ggsave(filename = volcano_name, plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
}
```

Want to generate a patchwork plot for UBC_1 cluster
```{r}
variable_markers <- ald_markers$UBC_1

# Setting log2FC threshold
log_fc_thresh <- 0.5

# Adding column to determine if gene is up regulated or down regulated
variable_markers <- mutate(
  variable_markers,
  direction = case_when(
    variable_markers$avg_log2FC >= log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Upregulated",
    variable_markers$avg_log2FC <= -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Downregulated",
    TRUE ~ "Not significant"
    )
  )
variable_markers$direction <- factor(variable_markers$direction, levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated", "Not significant"))

# Adding column denotating genes to label
variable_markers$feature_labelled <- ifelse(abs(variable_markers$avg_log2FC) > log_fc_thresh + 0.25 & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 10^-30, variable_markers$feature, NA)

# Dealing with padjval = 0. -log10(0) = infinity therefore we need to deal with the 0 value by setting it as something small
non_zero <- variable_markers$p_val_adj[variable_markers$p_val_adj != 0]
# Find the smallest value
min_val <- min(non_zero)
# Multiply the smallest value by 0.1 and assign to p_val_adj values
variable_markers$p_val_adj <- ifelse(variable_markers$p_val_adj == 0, min_val*exp(-1), variable_markers$p_val_adj)

n_up <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC > log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)
n_down <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC < -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)

gene_numbers <- paste0(
  "n = ", nrow(variable_markers),
  "; down = ", n_down,
  "; up = ", n_up
)

# Creating the volcano plot
plt_1 <- make_volcano(
  data = variable_markers,
  log_fc = avg_log2FC,
  log_pval = -log10(p_val_adj),
  direction = direction,
  log_fc_thresh = c(-log_fc_thresh, log_fc_thresh),
  log_pval_thresh = -log10(0.05),
  label_num_genes = TRUE
) + 
theme_classic() +
labs(x = expression(log[2]~"(fold change)"), y = expression(-log[10]~"(adj. p-value)")) +
scale_color_manual(values = c("Upregulated" = "red", "Downregulated" = "blue", "Not significant" = "grey")) +
ggtitle("Aldinger: UBC_1 genes") +
theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15, hjust = 0.5),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14), 
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14),
  legend.position = "none") +
guides(color = guide_legend(title = NULL), shape = guide_legend(title = "TF")) +
geom_text_repel(aes(label = feature_labelled), size = 4, show.legend = FALSE) +
labs(subtitle = gene_numbers)
```

```{r}
variable_markers <- sepp_markers$UBC_1

# Setting log2FC threshold
log_fc_thresh <- 0.5

# Adding column to determine if gene is up regulated or down regulated
variable_markers <- mutate(
  variable_markers,
  direction = case_when(
    variable_markers$avg_log2FC >= log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Upregulated",
    variable_markers$avg_log2FC <= -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Downregulated",
    TRUE ~ "Not significant"
    )
  )
variable_markers$direction <- factor(variable_markers$direction, levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated", "Not significant"))

# Adding column denotating genes to label
variable_markers$feature_labelled <- ifelse(abs(variable_markers$avg_log2FC) > log_fc_thresh + 0.25 & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 10^-30, variable_markers$feature, NA)

# Dealing with padjval = 0. -log10(0) = infinity therefore we need to deal with the 0 value by setting it as something small
non_zero <- variable_markers$p_val_adj[variable_markers$p_val_adj != 0]
# Find the smallest value
min_val <- min(non_zero)
# Multiply the smallest value by 0.1 and assign to p_val_adj values
variable_markers$p_val_adj <- ifelse(variable_markers$p_val_adj == 0, min_val*exp(-1), variable_markers$p_val_adj)

n_up <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC > log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)
n_down <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC < -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)

gene_numbers <- paste0(
  "n = ", nrow(variable_markers),
  "; down = ", n_down,
  "; up = ", n_up
)

# Creating the volcano plot
plt_2 <- make_volcano(
  data = variable_markers,
  log_fc = avg_log2FC,
  log_pval = -log10(p_val_adj),
  direction = direction,
  log_fc_thresh = c(-log_fc_thresh, log_fc_thresh),
  log_pval_thresh = -log10(0.05),
  label_num_genes = TRUE
) + 
theme_classic() +
labs(x = expression(log[2]~"(fold change)"), y = expression(-log[10]~"(adj. p-value)")) +
scale_color_manual(values = c("Upregulated" = "red", "Downregulated" = "blue", "Not significant" = "grey")) +
ggtitle("Sepp: UBC_1 genes") +
theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15, hjust = 0.5),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14), 
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14),
  legend.position = "none") +
guides(color = guide_legend(title = NULL), shape = guide_legend(title = "TF")) +
geom_text_repel(aes(label = feature_labelled), size = 4, show.legend = FALSE) +
labs(subtitle = gene_numbers)
```
```{r}
variable_markers <- ald_markers$UBC_1 %>%
  filter(is_TF == "TRUE")

# Setting log2FC threshold
log_fc_thresh <- 0

# Adding column denotating genes to label
variable_markers$feature_labelled <- ifelse(abs(variable_markers$avg_log2FC) > 0.15 & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 10^-8, variable_markers$feature, NA)

# Adding column to determine if gene is up regulated or down regulated
variable_markers <- mutate(
  variable_markers,
  direction = case_when(
    variable_markers$avg_log2FC >= log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Upregulated",
    variable_markers$avg_log2FC <= -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Downregulated",
    TRUE ~ "Not significant"
    )
  )
variable_markers$direction <- factor(variable_markers$direction, levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated", "Not significant"))

# Dealing with padjval = 0. -log10(0) = infinity therefore we need to deal with the 0 value by setting it as something small
non_zero <- variable_markers$p_val_adj[variable_markers$p_val_adj != 0]
# Find the smallest value
min_val <- min(non_zero)
# Multiply the smallest value by 0.1 and assign to p_val_adj values
variable_markers$p_val_adj <- ifelse(variable_markers$p_val_adj == 0, min_val*exp(-1), variable_markers$p_val_adj)

n_up <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC > log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)
n_down <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC < -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)

gene_numbers <- paste0(
  "n = ", nrow(variable_markers),
  "; down = ", n_down,
  "; up = ", n_up
)

# Creating the volcano plot
plt_3 <- make_volcano(
  data = variable_markers,
  log_fc = avg_log2FC,
  log_pval = -log10(p_val_adj),
  log_fc_thresh = c(-log_fc_thresh, log_fc_thresh),
  log_pval_thresh = -log10(0.05),
  label_num_genes = TRUE
) + 
theme_classic() +
labs(x = expression(log[2]~"(fold change)"), y = expression(-log[10]~"(adj. p-value)")) +
geom_point(aes(color = direction)) +
scale_color_manual(values = c("Upregulated" = "red", "Downregulated" = "blue", "Not significant" = "grey")) +
ggtitle("Aldinger: UBC_1 transcription factors") +
theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15, hjust = 0.5),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14), 
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14),
  legend.position = "none") +
geom_text_repel(aes(label = feature_labelled), size = 4, show.legend = FALSE) +
labs(subtitle = gene_numbers) +
theme(legend.position = "none")
```
```{r}
variable_markers <- sepp_markers$UBC_1 %>%
  filter(is_TF == "TRUE")

# Setting log2FC threshold
log_fc_thresh <- 0

# Adding column denotating genes to label
variable_markers$feature_labelled <- ifelse(abs(variable_markers$avg_log2FC) > 0.2 & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 10^-5, variable_markers$feature, NA)

# Adding column to determine if gene is up regulated or down regulated
variable_markers <- mutate(
  variable_markers,
  direction = case_when(
    variable_markers$avg_log2FC >= log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Upregulated",
    variable_markers$avg_log2FC <= -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 ~ "Downregulated",
    TRUE ~ "Not significant"
    )
  )
variable_markers$direction <- factor(variable_markers$direction, levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated", "Not significant"))

# Dealing with padjval = 0. -log10(0) = infinity therefore we need to deal with the 0 value by setting it as something small
non_zero <- variable_markers$p_val_adj[variable_markers$p_val_adj != 0]
# Find the smallest value
min_val <- min(non_zero)
# Multiply the smallest value by 0.1 and assign to p_val_adj values
variable_markers$p_val_adj <- ifelse(variable_markers$p_val_adj == 0, min_val*exp(-1), variable_markers$p_val_adj)

n_up <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC > log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)
n_down <- sum(variable_markers$avg_log2FC < -log_fc_thresh & variable_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)

gene_numbers <- paste0(
  "n = ", nrow(variable_markers),
  "; down = ", n_down,
  "; up = ", n_up
)

# Creating the volcano plot
plt_4 <- make_volcano(
  data = variable_markers,
  log_fc = avg_log2FC,
  log_pval = -log10(p_val_adj),
  log_fc_thresh = c(-log_fc_thresh, log_fc_thresh),
  log_pval_thresh = -log10(0.05),
  label_num_genes = TRUE
) + 
theme_classic() +
labs(x = expression(log[2]~"(fold change)"), y = expression(-log[10]~"(adj. p-value)")) +
geom_point(aes(color = direction)) +
scale_color_manual(values = c("Upregulated" = "red", "Downregulated" = "blue", "Not significant" = "grey")) +
ggtitle("Sepp: UBC_1 transcription factors") +
theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15, hjust = 0.5),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14), 
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14),
  legend.position = "none") +
geom_text_repel(aes(label = feature_labelled), size = 4, show.legend = FALSE) +
labs(subtitle = gene_numbers) +
theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
volcano_plt <- wrap_plots(plt_1, plt_2, plt_3, plt_4, guides = "collect")
plot_name <- "UBC_1_volcano_combined.png"
ggsave(filename = plot_name, plot = volcano_plt , path = out_directory, 
          width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Combined volcano plot for UBC_1 cluster](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240719/UBC_1_volcano_combined.png)
